entry.title: Dynamo v1.3.0 (stable)
entry.summary: Tool-calling and reasoning overhaul, RL rollout serving, the largest Router buildout to date, SLA-driven Planner autoscaling, and production GPU Memory Service on Kubernetes.

entry.title: Dynamo v1.2.1 (patch)
entry.summary: Patch release. Same backend pins as v1.2.0.

entry.title: Dynamo v1.3.0-dev.1 (platform-preview)
entry.summary: Full-platform preview of v1.3.0: complete runtime matrix, wheels on pypi.nvidia.com, crates, and Helm charts. Superseded by v1.3.0 GA.

entry.title: Dynamo v1.2.0 (stable)
entry.summary: DGD/DGDR v1beta1, CRTC as the default KV router, inter-pod GPU Memory Service, Dynamo Snapshot on CRI-O/OpenShift, and DeepSeek-V4 recipes on vLLM.

entry.title: Dynamo v1.2.0-deepseek-v4-dev.3 (model-build)
entry.summary: DeepSeek-V4 Blackwell preview; vLLM + SGLang containers only.

entry.title: Dynamo v1.1.1 (patch)
entry.summary: Patch release. Same backend pins as v1.1.0.

entry.title: Dynamo v1.2.0-deepseek-v4-dev.2 (model-build)
entry.summary: DeepSeek-V4 Blackwell preview; vLLM + SGLang containers only.

entry.title: Dynamo v1.1.0 (stable)
entry.summary: Resilient KV routing at scale, Anthropic Messages API support, performance modeling and offline replay, and the multimodal embedding cache.

entry.title: Dynamo v1.0.2 (patch)
entry.summary: No artifact additions or removals versus v1.0.0.

entry.title: Dynamo v1.1.0-dev.3 (platform-preview)
entry.summary: Partial platform preview: TRT-LLM runtime image + wheels only.

entry.title: Dynamo v1.1.0-dev.2 (platform-preview)
entry.summary: Partial platform preview: SGLang + TRT-LLM runtime images + wheels.

entry.title: Dynamo v1.1.0-dev.1 (platform-preview)
entry.summary: Platform preview: runtime matrix, wheels on pypi.nvidia.com, Helm charts.

entry.title: Dynamo v1.0.1 (patch)
entry.summary: No artifact additions or removals versus v1.0.0.

entry.title: Dynamo v1.0.0 (stable)
entry.summary: First GA release: unified configuration, Kubernetes production readiness, multimodal serving, and the agents surface.

entry.title: Dynamo v0.9.1 (patch)
entry.summary: No artifact additions or removals versus v0.9.0.

entry.title: Dynamo v0.9.0 (stable)
entry.summary: First publish of dynamo-tokens crate. Deprecated dynamo-graph Helm chart dropped from the publish stream.

entry.title: Dynamo v0.8.1 (patch)
entry.summary: Post trains .post1/.post2/.post3 republished the TRT-LLM runtime image and PyPI wheels only.

entry.title: Dynamo v0.8.0 (stable)
entry.summary: dynamo-frontend image and CUDA 13 variants for vLLM and SGLang. First publish of dynamo-memory and dynamo-config crates.

entry.title: Dynamo v0.6.0 (stable)
entry.summary: Oldest release tracked on this page.
